economic_notes: First Nation has 10% investment in Amik-BBF HydroKap LP and Amik-CTR HydroKap LP; 33% investment in 2454357 Ontario Inc. and Three Nations Drilling LP. Treaty Land Entitlement Trust exists but not consolidated. COVID-19 uncertainty noted subsequent to year end.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED on two bases: (1) inability to confirm all expenses for prior year 2019 due to lack of supporting documentation affecting comparability; (2) Chapleau Ojibwe First Nation Treaty Land Entitlement Trust (created 2017) has NOT been consolidated despite being controlled by the First Nation — departure from PSAS. Effects of non-consolidation undetermined. Schedule of Remuneration was prepared as a separate Review Engagement Report and figures not included in this document. Education expenses shown as $0 in segment disclosure (education segment shows $0 expenses but $20,323 net revenue after deferred). Demand loans of $242,403 included in current liabilities. Province of Ontario revenue of $54,660 appears only in comparative 2019 segment but $54,660 shown in 2019 comparative statement of operations; 2020 statement shows no Province of Ontario line in main statements but segment shows nil — discrepancy noted.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
